texto: It is said that we do not make the guilty party suffer for the sake of suffering
autor: it is nonetheless true that we find it right that he should suffer.
explicacao: Citação de it is nonetheless true that we find it right that he should suffer. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It is said that we do not make the guilty party suffer for the sake of suffering” articula reflexao, emile-durkheim, guilty em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
